chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1731 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 17.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Ishtiaque Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith ASI Allah Bux Bhatti P.S Shahdadpur. -.-.-. Today, learned State Counsel files parawise comments on behalf of police officials, according to which, police officials have not threatened the petitioner and the dispute, if any, is between petitioner and private respondents and that too is of a civil nature, which has been refuted by petitioner’s Counsel by stating that police officials have visited the petitioner at the behest of private respondents and caused unnecessary harassment to him (petitioner) in this petition. This petition is disposed of with specific directions to the police officials that they shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if they are approached by the petitioner for providing protection, the same will be provided, but strictly in accordance with law. Similarly, private respondents are also restrained from causing any harassment or extending threats to the petitioner, however, with the clarification that if they have any grievance against the petitioner, the same can be addressed by invoking due process of law and not by taking law in their hands. Copy of this order be provided to learned State Counsel for compliance. JUDGE
